name: No Bake Chocolate Cookies]
recipeInstructions:
1. Put oatmeal and peanut butter in a large bowl.
2. Mix the rest of the ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
3. Boil for 1 minute, then remove from heat.
4. Add 1 teaspoon vanilla to the mixture.
5. Pour over the oatmeal and peanut butter mixture.
6. Mix well and press into an 8x8 pan or drop from a spoon onto wax paper.
7. Cool.
